headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 11, 2026**
article:
The Washington Nationals fell to the Miami Marlins in a 5-2 loss, with Heriberto Hernández leading the Nationals' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. Andrew Nardi pitched a strong 0.2 innings in relief, striking out 2 batters without allowing a run.

Several key players have been affected by injuries, with Addison Barger being placed on the 10-day injured list by the Toronto Blue Jays due to right elbow inflammation. The Atlanta Braves also placed Eli White on the 7-day injured list with a concussion. Other teams have made roster moves, including the Detroit Tigers transferring Justin Verlander to the 60-day injured list with left hip inflammation.

The San Francisco Giants made a significant trade, acquiring left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey. The Baltimore Orioles also made a trade, acquiring right-handed pitchers Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Nationals Fall to Marlins in 5-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dropped a 5-2 decision to the Miami Marlins, with Heriberto Hernández leading the Nationals' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. Andrew Nardi pitched a strong 0.2 innings in relief, striking out 2 batters without allowing a run.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Athletics in Thrilling Match**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 2-1 victory over the Athletics, with Gunnar Henderson leading the team with 2 hits and 1 RBI. Chris Bassitt earned the win for the Orioles, pitching 6.0 innings with 6 strikeouts and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Red Sox 4-1**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 4-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, with Nick Martinez earning the win. Bryan Baker earned the save in the win.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Phillies in Dominant 6-0 Shutout**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies secured a convincing 6-0 victory over the Colorado Rockies, with Cristopher Sánchez pitching 7.0 innings of shutout baseball, striking out 7 batters and allowing 6 hits. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with 3 hits, including 2 home runs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays' Addison Barger Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Toronto Blue Jays right fielder Addison Barger has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation, effective retroactive to May 10, 2026.

top_news.title: **Giants Acquire Lefty in Trade**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants made a move on May 9, 2026, acquiring left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey.
